# function: jwt_sign

Builds a JWT with aud=Environment ID and signs it with HS256 using the Access key. Optionally includes sub, CKBox role, and exp via ttl_seconds.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
jwt_sign(environment_id string, access_key string, sub string, ckbox_role string, ttl_seconds number, iat_unix number) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `environment_id` (String) Cloud Environment ID (maps to aud).
1. `access_key` (String) Access key used as HS256 secret (signature key).
1. `sub` (String) Optional user id (sub). If empty or null, omitted.
1. `ckbox_role` (String) Optional CKBox role (auth.ckbox.role), e.g. admin. If empty or null, auth is omitted.
1. `ttl_seconds` (Number) Optional token TTL in seconds. If > 0, exp = iat + ttl_seconds is added. Default: 0 (no exp).
1. `iat_unix` (Number) Optional issued-at unix seconds. If set, used instead of current time.
